originalSource: Azure Logic Apps runtime reference corpus
notes: Long-running HTTP request with 'operationOptions: Asynchronous' on the Response action — the caller receives a 202 Accepted with a polling URL, and Logic Apps drives the wait. Upstream Mustache placeholder '{{WaitTimeInSecondsPlaceHolder}}' resolved to 30 seconds; substitute the real interval at emission. The Wait action with 'unit: Second' is the canonical delay shape — do not invent.
